description: Post-US4 main-chunk gzipped size baseline (SC-012, Spec 021 Phase 6).
notes: Main chunk = dist/assets/index-*.js gzipped. Measured via vite build output.
Motion library (~28 KB gzipped) is code-split into install_modal-*.js chunk and loads on demand.
Route transitions are CSS-only (keyframe + prefers-reduced-motion) — zero JS cost.
